message:
fix(transport): widen weight accumulator to u64 in weighted round-robin

The total_weight and cumulative accumulators in the weighted round-robin
load balancer used u32, which could silently overflow with many
high-weight endpoints. Widen to u64 throughout to prevent silent
wraparound that would cause incorrect endpoint selection.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
